what_it_does: The method reference for the analysis folder: it states what the analysis layer is (a place that reconstructs the generative rules behind the source material in ingest/, not a style to copy and not a change to the design system), defines the 6-step per-folder workflow, the 9-level analytical lens, the proposed folder order, and the provisional key findings from the first samples.
observations: Opens with a prominent pointer that a new session should read analysis/HANDOFF.md first as the complete briefing; this README is just the method reference.

States the folder's role: it is the analysis layer, does NOT change the design system, and reconstructs generative rules so confirmed universals can later be promoted into tokens, primitives, and components.
States the governing principle: images are evidence of a system, not a style to copy; rules are extracted as ratios and relationships, never fixed pixels, so they recompute at any size.

Defines a 6-step workflow per folder: Ingest -> Analyse (9-level lens, sample pixels, measure as % of frame) -> Diff (mark confirms/new/generalises/contradicts) -> Log gaps (SYSTEM-GAPS.md) -> Update progress (PROGRESS.md) -> Synthesise only after evidence.
Tabulates the 9-level lens: 0 Frame, 1 Grid & spatial structure, 2 Tonal zoning, 3 Type, 4 Colour & brand, 5 Atoms, 6 Layout patterns, 7 Sequence & rhythm, 8 Construction, 9 Responsive rules.
Gives a proposed folder order: start with the cleanest canonical deck for baseline vocabulary, then denser/other-ratio dialects, then web + one-pager families.

Lists provisional key findings from the first 5 samples: zoning is near-imperceptible warm-white separation (not semantic colour blocks; --zone-* too saturated, to be recalibrated), a faint blueprint ghost, gold as the single accent with a gold->bronze->brown gradient, premium warm photography, thin icons, embedded interactive affordances, and the real surface ratios in play (16:9, 3:2, A4, tall web).
standouts: The framing 'the images are evidence of a system, not a style to copy' — the entire method is reverse-engineering generative rules, not imitation.
Rules extracted as ratios and relationships (never fixed pixels) so they recompute at any screen size and drive both static and interactive output.
The explicit gate 'Synthesise only after evidence' — promotion into the system is forbidden until multi-sample confirmation.
The 9-level lens as a fixed analytical grammar applied uniformly to every folder.
conventions: analysis-is-not-mutation: this layer never edits the design system; it only reconstructs rules.
ratios-not-pixels: extract relationships that recompute, never fixed values.
evidence-before-synthesis: confirmed universals only are promoted, and only after the diff/log steps.
evidence-diff discipline: every rule marked confirms / new / generalises / contradicts.
fixed-lens analysis: the same 9-level lens applied to every folder for comparability.
single-home routing: gaps go to SYSTEM-GAPS.md, progress to PROGRESS.md, briefing to HANDOFF.md.
concerns: The key findings section is explicitly marked provisional (from first 5 samples) and could be read as settled if skimmed — it predates the multi-folder confirmations in PROGRESS.md.
Defers the real boot briefing to HANDOFF.md, so this README alone is incomplete as an entry point despite being the named README.
notes: The method reference for the DNA-extraction analysis layer: a 6-step per-folder workflow and a fixed 9-level lens, with the standing rule that images are evidence of a system and rules are extracted as ratios, promoted into the design system only after evidence.
questions: Have the provisional first-5-sample findings been superseded by the confirmed values elsewhere, and should this README be updated to point to them?
Why is the canonical baseline deck left ambiguous here (pitch-deck or deck1-2026) when PROGRESS.md later names deck1-2026 the canonical master?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — it presents itself as the analysis-method reference (deferring the full briefing to HANDOFF.md) and it delivers the method: the layer's role, the principle, the workflow, the lens, the folder order, and provisional findings.
intention_signals: Inferred: the README is trying to enforce a disciplined reverse-engineering method — treat the source material as evidence of an underlying generative system, extract its rules as size-independent ratios via a uniform lens, and only promote confirmed universals into the design system after diffing and logging — so the eventual tokens/primitives are grounded and drift-free rather than hand-copied from images.
novelty: Codifies design analysis as a formal, repeatable, evidence-gated reverse-engineering pipeline with a fixed 9-level lens and an explicit no-synthesis-before-evidence gate, treating mockups as data about a system rather than as targets to clone.
contribution: Contributes the analysis method itself — the 6-step workflow, the 9-level lens, the ratios-not-pixels and system-not-style principles, and the evidence-before-synthesis gate — the procedural backbone a fused system would keep for how design evidence is turned into grounded tokens and primitives.
summary_for_embedding: Method reference for the design-DNA analysis layer: states that source images are evidence of a generative system (not a style to copy), defines a 6-step per-folder workflow and a 9-level analytical lens, extracts rules as size-independent ratios, and promotes confirmed universals into the design system only after evidence.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to enforce a disciplined, evidence-gated reverse-engineering method that reconstructs the generative rules behind source material as ratios and relationships via a uniform lens, so confirmed universals can be promoted into the design system's tokens and primitives without drift or imitation.
